description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements versus generic tags, testing both basic markup familiarity and deeper understanding of modern web standards. It is positioned as a moderate‑difficulty challenge with a light, encouraging tone that nudges learners to improve their semantic HTML usage. The style is informal and motivational, prompting participants to reflect on their skills and share results.
Topics: HTML5 semantic elements, Difference between <div> and <span>, Modern web markup best practices, Accessibility considerations
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students who have basic HTML experience and want to validate or deepen their understanding of HTML5 semantics.
